description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a low perimeter wall and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof with a mix of white and dark gray exterior finishes, and large windows that allow ample natural light. The front yard includes a paved driveway, a small garden, and a patio area with outdoor seating. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool, additional seating areas, and green lawn space. The house has multiple entry points, including a prominent main entrance and a garage door. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of functional and aesthetic elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped yard, and a swimming pool, enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, driveway, front garden, and several trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_2: Front view with a clear look at the main entryway, garage, and front patio.
description_view_3: Back-left view focusing on the pool, rear lawn, and side garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, small porch, and paved approach with minimal decorative elements.
